page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for parallel processing workloads. It features 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 372.0 GB of system memory. The hardware configuration includes four NVIDIA T4 GPUs from the Turing family, providing a combined 64 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, requiring external storage solutions, but offers a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core performance. While single-core stress-ng and single-threaded compression tests register in the lower percentiles, multi-core performance is strong, as evidenced by high multi-threaded stress-ng and bzip3 decompression scores. Memory bandwidth for cached small blocks is highly efficient, though large-block uncached read and write speeds remain average. The system also exhibits strong performance in Redis SET operations, processing 64.27 million operations per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server offers a dense allocation of GPU and CPU resources, though the lack of local storage represents a key tradeoff that requires external storage provisioning. The instance is highly suited for workloads such as multi-GPU machine learning inference, parallel data processing, multi-threaded decompression tasks, and high-throughput Redis caching environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs and 372.0 GB of RAM. Equipped with four NVIDIA T4 GPUs providing a total of 64 GB VRAM, this x86_64 server is built for parallel computing tasks. It lacks local storage but provides 30 Gbps of baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks reveal weak single-core execution but strong multi-core capabilities, highlighted by high multi-threaded stress-ng scores and 64.27 million Redis SET operations per second. Cached memory bandwidth is highly efficient, while uncached large-block transfers perform at average levels. This resource-dense profile is well-suited for parallel processing, multi-GPU inference, and high-throughput caching workloads where local storage is not a primary requirement.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs, optimized for parallel computing and multi-threaded workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge features 96 Intel vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs for parallel processing workloads.
tagline: A multi-GPU accelerated platform featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and sixty-four gigabytes of total video memory for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA T4 GPUs providing 64 GB of total VRAM
96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores with 372 GB RAM
Strong multi-core and multi-threaded benchmark performance
No local storage included, requiring external storage solutions
Best suited for multi-GPU inference and parallel data processing
